  1. org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery
 
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery.configclient
 
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery.dependency
 
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery.reactive
 
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery.watcher
 
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.serviceregistry
 
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.support
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery used by org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery
    Class
    Description
    ConditionalOnLoadBalancerForZookeeperEnabled
    Wrapper annotation to enable Spring Cloud LoadBalancer for Zookeeper.
    ConditionalOnZookeeperDiscoveryEnabled
    Wrapper annotation to enable Zookeeper Discovery.
    ZookeeperDiscoveryClient
    Zookeeper version of DiscoveryClient.
    ZookeeperDiscoveryHealthIndicator
    HealthIndicator that presents the status of all instances registered in Zookeeper.
    ZookeeperDiscoveryProperties
    Properties related to Zookeeper's Service Discovery.
    ZookeeperInstance
    Represents the default payload of a registered service in Zookeeper.
    ZookeeperServiceWatch
    A TreeCacheListener that sends HeartbeatEvent when an entry inside Zookeeper has changed.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery used by org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.discovery.configclient
    Class
    Description
    ZookeeperDiscoveryProperties
    Properties related to Zookeeper's Service Discovery.

    Description
    ConditionalOnLoadBalancerForZookeeperEnabled
    Wrapper annotation to enable Spring Cloud LoadBalancer for Zookeeper.
